pageContext.name: 'The Creep’ Glow-In-The-Dark Portrait
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Incendium LLC are thrilled to present to all you horror fans out there, 'The Creep' Glow-In-The-Dark Portrait!  A note from the ghoulishly grand team at Incendium:  Celebrating the launch of Creepshow on Shudder, and coming soon to AMC, we teamed up with the legendary artist, director, and all-around horror maestro Greg Nicotero!  Utilizing Greg's original production photography as reference, we commissioned artist Carlos Dattoli to develop a full portrait under a blood moon!  We are proud to present an officially licensed Creepshow 'The Creep' Glow-In-The-Dark Portrait.
